subcodes.first_line: The ocean hath surged and the fragrance hath wafted, and the Day is come while the people remain in manifest delusion. The cry hath been raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ماج البحر و هاج العرف و اتی الیوم و القوم فی وهم مبین قد ارتفعت الصیحه و
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @Mosaic imagery, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
